task_completion.description: Rename the existing audio track to 'Main Mix'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the DAW mixer or timeline, the original audio track's name is changed to 'Main Mix' (or contains 'main mix').

task_completion.description: Import a reference audio file to a new track named 'Reference'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new track named 'Reference' (or containing 'ref') is visible in the timeline or mixer, and it contains an audio region/clip.
The mute button (usually 'M') on the 'Reference' track is toggled on/highlighted.

task_completion.description: Route the 'Reference' track directly to System/Hardware Playback outputs
task_completion.visual_evidence: The output routing section of the 'Reference' track channel strip shows it is routed to hardware/system playback (e.g., 'System', 'Hardware', 'Playback 1+2') rather than the 'Master' bus.

task_completion.description: Insert a mastering plugin on the Master bus
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Master bus channel strip shows a plugin inserted in its FX/plugin slots (e.g., a limiter, compressor, or EQ).
The DAW window title bar lacks an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk), or the agent is seen clicking 'Save' in the File menu.

integrity.description: The agent used the DAW Graphical User Interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a DAW (like Ardour), including the mixer, timeline, and routing windows, rather than terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: The imported reference file is a genuine audio file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Reference' track in the timeline displays a visible audio waveform, not an empty block.

integrity.description: The routing changes were made using the application's actual routing matrix or channel strip.
integrity.visual_evidence: The routing menu or connection matrix window is visible in the screenshots, showing the actual disconnection from Master and connection to Hardware.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The main track name must contain 'main mix' (case-insensitive). The reference track name must contain 'ref' (case-insensitive). Any plugin inserted on the Master bus is acceptable to fulfill the mastering plugin requirement, provided it is not a basic utility (blacklisted: amp, meter, polarity, fader, delay, system delay). The pass threshold is 75.
